summary: GPS WebSocket Upgrade - Complete testing of backend WebSocket endpoints and frontend UI. All 10 backend WebSocket tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E tests passed for Fleet GPS Map and GPS Admin Map with WebSocket real-time updates, car icons, vehicle detail panels, search, and filters.

issues: Console warning about HTML nesting (span inside select/option) - React dev tools injection, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing 3 fleet vehicles and 4 admin vehicles used for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GPS WebSocket upgrade fully functional. Both Fleet GPS Map (/fleet/geolocation) and GPS Admin Map (/gps-admin/map) working with WebSocket real-time updates. Car SVG icons with heading rotation visible on map. Vehicle detail panels show all telemetry data (speed, heading, satellites, ignition ON/OFF, coordinates, timestamp). Status indicators working (green=moving, amber=stopped, red=offline, gray=gps_lost). Search filters by name/IMEI/driver. Status filters working. Company filter on admin map working. Light theme (CartoDB light tiles) correctly implemented.

backend_websocket_tests: GPS Admin WS initial data with type='initial' ✓
GPS Admin WS rejects invalid token ✓
Fleet WS initial data with type='initial' ✓
fleet_gps_map_tests: Map loads with light theme (CartoDB light_all tiles) ✓
Car SVG icons visible on map with heading rotation ✓
Sidebar shows vehicle list with name, speed (km/h), driver, plate, time ago ✓
Status filter buttons (Tous, moving, stopped, offline, gps_lost) ✓
Add device button opens modal with IMEI, Vehicle, Plate, Driver fields ✓
Vehicle click shows detail panel with: status, name, plate, driver, IMEI, position, speed, heading (Cap), satellites, ignition ON/OFF, timestamp ✓
gps_admin_map_tests: Map loads with light theme (CartoDB light_all tiles) ✓
Car SVG icons visible on map ✓
Sidebar shows 4 vehicles with name, speed, driver, time ago ✓
Company filter dropdown shows 'Toutes les societes (4)' ✓
Vehicle click shows detail popup with: name, plate, company, speed, ignition, driver, IMEI, coordinates, timestamp ✓

vehicle_statuses_verified.gps_lost: gray/black - no lat/lng or no timestamp
